title: Archive #0301-UNKNOWN | Ghost Signal
description: A transmission log with a broken identity chain. The sender is referenced before being established.

events.label: Signal Detected
events.text:
Timestamp: 2157-11-30 04:03:17
Relay Station DELTA-4 detected an unregistered inbound signal.
Channel status: OPEN. Source identifier: UNKNOWN.
Signal strength: 94%. Decryption layer: ACTIVE.

events.label: Transmission Received
events.text:
He confirmed receipt of the coordinates and acknowledged the extraction window.
The message was signed with a Nexus-7 clearance cipher.
Transmission logged. Channel still open.
events._bug_note: entity_sender_identified is never established -- 'He' is referenced with no prior identification

events.label: Channel Closed
events.text:
Transmission complete. Channel handshake terminated by remote party.
Coordinates committed to navigation buffer.
Relay Station DELTA-4 returned to standby mode.
